results.title: Phase 1 setup-first planning refinement
results.content: For rental-management-ui, the user clarified that the first implementation focus should be tech stack setup, project scaffold, and project styling before deeper API work. Instead of inserting a pre-Phase-1 decimal phase, the safe planning move was to reframe Phase 1 itself and create 01-CONTEXT plus 01-01/01-02/01-03 plans covering project scaffold/providers, design tokens and shell, then auth pages and protected routing. STATE and .continue-here were updated so the next execution step is 01-01-PLAN.md while Phase 01.1 remains queued for typed API integration.

results.title: Resume state after Phase 01.1 planning refinement
results.content: Resumed rental-management-ui on 2026-04-01 with STATE.md present, no HANDOFF.json, no .continue-here checkpoint, and no interrupted agent. Current active focus remains Phase 01.1 api-integration-contract-and-typed-data-layer. There is one incomplete execution artifact: .planning/phases/01.1-api-integration-contract-and-typed-data-layer/01.1-03-PLAN.md, which is the final plan in the phase and is ready to execute. Recent planning refinement expanded 01.1-03 to cover login bootstrap plus protected follow-up request, 401 vs 403 behavior, base URL normalization, typed query filters, delete-style no-content responses, PDF download handling, and explicit TODO visibility for unresolved backend payloads. Working tree is dirty only for .planning/config.json outside the just-committed planning docs.

results.title: Phase 4.0 MCP gateway auth/dashboard design drafted
results.content: Created docs/design/mcp-gateway-auth-dashboard.md to redesign Minder onboarding around a client-aware MCP gateway. The design separates AdminUser and Client identities, adds Client/ClientApiKey/ClientSession/AuditLog entities, proposes token exchange plus simple client-key bootstrap modes, uses Redis for short-lived session state and MongoDB for durable metadata, and defines dashboard backend/frontend scope for client/API key management and onboarding templates. Also updated docs/TASK_BREAKDOWN.md with Phase 4.0 tasks and docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md to mark Phase 4 IN PROGRESS at design stage.

results.title: Phase 01.1 plan refinement from integration docs
results.content: Reviewed .planning/frontend-integration-contract.md and .planning/frontend-screen-api-map.md in rental-management-ui and refined the active Phase 01.1 planning artifacts instead of creating a new phase. Updated 01.1-CONTEXT to lock in runtime decisions for base URL normalization with or without /api, typed query filters like houseId/roomId/billingMonth, no-content delete handling, string-or-string[] error message preservation, transport-vs-presentation date/money boundaries, and visible PDF/CORS risk. Updated 01.1-03-PLAN so smoke coverage now explicitly tests login plus one authenticated follow-up request, 401 vs 403 behavior, JSON envelope parsing, binary PDF flow, base URL normalization, query serialization, empty-body deletes, and localized TODOs for unresolved payloads such as debt summary, move-in/out, room-service assignments, and asset logs. Also corrected frontend-screen-api-map.md to link to the local frontend integration contract file in the UI repo.

results.title: Minder plan translated and expanded
results.content: Translated docs/PLAN.md fully to English and expanded the architecture to include workflow governance, dashboard-configured process enforcement, repository-local state under .minder/, workflow planner node, workflow tools, repository context stores, and MCP-guided next-step orchestration for TDD-style delivery. Document version updated to 3.0 and marked ready for implementation review.
